parameters-en.Drive: Controls the amount of gain applied to the signal, which influences the level of distortion.
parameters-en.Bass: Controls the low frequency EQ (60 Hz) of the tonestack.
parameters-en.Low Mid: Controls the low midrange frequency EQ (250 Hz) of the tonestack.
parameters-en.High Mid: Controls the high midrange frequency EQ (1 kHz) of the tonestack.
parameters-en.Treble: Controls the high frequency EQ (4 kHz) of the tonestack.
parameters-en.Level: Controls the overall level of the Amp block. Unlike Master Volume, it has no effect on the block's tone.
parameters-en.Master: Controls the Master Volume of the amplifier.
parameters-en.Boost: Adds gain to the post-tonestack signal. At higher settings, a bit of overdrive/distortion can be heard.
parameters-en.Contour: When on, adds a notch filter around 500 Hz to provide a smoother, rounder sound.
